home.seoDescription: Shop Mochirii Cosmetics skincare by routine, with ingredients, directions, skin suitability, and product details for every formula.

collectionsIndex.heading: Choose your next step
collectionsIndex.intro: Browse skincare for cleansing, hydration, brightening, smoothing, and moisture support.

pages.title: About
pages.bodyHtml:
Mochirii Cosmetics organizes skincare by routine step: cleansing, hydration, brightening, and moisture support. Compare products by skin suitability, ingredients, texture, and use to find what fits your routine.

Each product page brings together key ingredients, directions, the full INCI list, warnings, origin, and certifications.
pages.seoTitle: About Mochirii Cosmetics | Skincare by Routine
pages.seoDescription: Learn how Mochirii Cosmetics organizes skincare formulas by routine step, skin type, ingredients, texture, and use.

pages.title: Contact
pages.bodyHtml:
Questions about a product, order, shipping, or returns? Send us a message using the form below.

Include your order number when asking about an order, or the product name when asking about skincare.
pages.seoTitle: Contact Mochirii Cosmetics | Product & Order Help
pages.seoDescription: Contact Mochirii Cosmetics for help with a product, an order, or a store policy.

collections.title: Mochirii Cosmetics
collections.description: Shop all 20 Mochirii Cosmetics formulas for cleansing, hydration, brightening, and moisture support.
collections.seoDescription: Shop all 20 Mochirii Cosmetics skincare formulas for cleansing, hydration, brightening, and moisture support.

collections.title: Cleanse & Tone
collections.description: Cleansers, makeup removers, and toner for the first steps of your skincare routine.
collections.seoDescription: Shop Mochirii cleansers, makeup removers, and toner for the first steps of your skincare routine.

collections.title: Hydrate & Barrier
collections.description: Lightweight gels and daily moisturizers for soft, comfortable-feeling skin.
collections.seoDescription: Shop Mochirii gels and daily moisturizers for hydration and soft, comfortable-feeling skin.

collections.title: Brighten & Smooth
collections.description: Explore serums, exfoliation, and eye care for a brighter, smoother-looking finish.
collections.seoDescription: Shop Mochirii serums, exfoliation, and eye care for a brighter, smoother-looking finish.

collections.title: Age-Support & Nourish
collections.description: Choose nourishing oils, creams, and serums for moisture, suppleness, and a smooth-looking finish.
collections.seoDescription: Shop Mochirii oils, creams, and serums for moisture, suppleness, and a smooth-looking finish.

copy.description: For normal-to-dry skin, this fast-absorbing serum combines peptides, hyaluronic acid, aloe, and sodium PCA. The lightweight texture layers easily and leaves skin hydrated with a smoother-looking finish.
copy.seoDescription: A fast-absorbing peptide serum with hyaluronic acid, aloe, and sodium PCA for hydrated, smoother-looking normal-to-dry skin.

copy.description: Made for dehydrated skin, this silky facial oil pairs a plant-derived retinol alternative with skin-softening oils. It leaves the complexion supple with a luminous-looking finish.
copy.seoTitle: Natural Retinol Alternative Oil Serum | Mochirii Cosmetics
copy.seoDescription: A silky facial oil with a plant-derived retinol alternative and skin-softening oils for supple, luminous-looking dehydrated skin.

copy.description: Vitamin C and vitamin E pair with hyaluronic acid and sodium PCA in this lightweight serum. It adds moisture while helping dull-looking skin appear brighter and more even.
copy.seoDescription: A lightweight vitamin C and E serum with hyaluronic acid and sodium PCA for moisture and brighter, more even-looking skin.

copy.description: Mature skin gets daily moisture from hyaluronic acid, shea butter, aloe, and betaine in this velvety cream. The complexion feels moisturized, smooth, and comfortable after application.
copy.seoDescription: A velvety day cream with hyaluronic acid, shea butter, aloe, and betaine for moisturized, smooth, comfortable mature skin.

copy.description: Hyaluronic acid, aloe, and betaine give this everyday moisturizer its lightweight feel. It leaves skin comfortably moisturized and sits neatly beneath makeup.
copy.seoDescription: An everyday cream with hyaluronic acid, aloe, and betaine for comfortable moisture that sits neatly beneath makeup.

copy.description: Lightweight hydration comes from hyaluronic acid, aloe, and sodium PCA in this gel for normal or mature skin. The formula adds moisture without a heavy finish.
copy.seoTitle: Double Hydration Boost Gel | Mochirii Cosmetics
copy.seoDescription: A lightweight gel with hyaluronic acid, aloe, and sodium PCA for comfortable hydration without a heavy finish.

copy.description: This oil-gel cleanser turns milky when water is added and lifts makeup and daily buildup. Plant oils leave sensitive or dehydrated skin soft after rinsing.
copy.seoTitle: Sensitive Skin Oil-to-Milk Cleanser | Mochirii Cosmetics
copy.seoDescription: A silky oil-to-milk cleanser that lifts makeup and buildup while leaving sensitive or dehydrated skin soft and nourished.

copy.description: Oil and water phases lift makeup and daily residue in this fragrance-free remover. Aloe and hyaluronic acid leave skin clean and comfortable.
copy.seoDescription: A fragrance-free two-phase makeup remover with aloe and hyaluronic acid for a clean, comfortable after-feel.

copy.description: Cocoa butter, shea butter, aloe, and sodium PCA give this night cream its rich texture. By morning, dry or mature skin feels soft, moisturized, and plump.
copy.seoDescription: A rich night cream with cocoa butter, shea butter, aloe, and sodium PCA for soft, moisturized, plump-feeling dry or mature skin.

copy.description: Ceramides, hyaluronic acid, shea butter, and aloe support this rich evening moisturizer for normal-to-dry skin. It adds moisture and leaves skin soft by morning.
copy.seoTitle: Ceramide Barrier Night Cream | Mochirii Cosmetics
copy.seoDescription: A rich evening moisturizer with ceramides, hyaluronic acid, shea butter, and aloe for soft, moisturized normal-to-dry skin.

copy.description: Niacinamide gives this gel moisturizer a simple place in routines for all skin types. The lightweight formula adds hydration and helps uneven-looking skin appear more balanced.
copy.seoDescription: A lightweight niacinamide gel moisturizer for all skin types that adds hydration and supports more balanced-looking skin.

copy.description: Shea butter and plant oils add slip to this silky cleansing milk for dry-feeling skin. It lifts makeup and daily buildup, then rinses away with a soft after-feel.
copy.seoDescription: A silky cleansing milk with shea butter and plant oils that lifts makeup and buildup while leaving dry-feeling skin soft.

copy.description: Uneven or congested-looking skin can use this concentrated exfoliating step as directed. It lifts surface buildup and leaves a smoother-looking, refreshed finish.
copy.seoDescription: A concentrated exfoliating step for uneven or congested-looking skin and a smoother-looking, refreshed finish.

copy.description: Vitamin E enriches this blend of facial oils for dry or mature skin. Its rich texture leaves skin soft, supple, and nourished.
copy.seoDescription: A rich blend of facial oils with vitamin E for soft, supple, comfortably nourished dry or mature skin.

copy.description: Bidens pilosa extract provides the plant-derived retinol alternative in this silky moisturizer. Hyaluronic acid, aloe, sodium PCA, and plant oils leave skin smooth and moisturized.
copy.seoDescription: A silky moisturizer with Bidens pilosa extract, hyaluronic acid, aloe, sodium PCA, and plant oils for smooth, comfortable skin.

copy.description: After cleansing, this lightweight toner clears away remaining residue. Hyaluronic acid leaves dry or mature skin refreshed and hydrated.
copy.seoDescription: A light hyaluronic acid toner that clears away the last traces of cleansing and leaves dry or mature skin comfortably hydrated.

copy.description: Sensitive-feeling or dehydrated skin gets a daily face-and-body cleanse with betaine and sodium PCA. Skin feels clean and comfortable rather than tight after rinsing.
copy.seoTitle: Sensitive Face & Body Cleanser | Mochirii Cosmetics
copy.seoDescription: A daily face and body cleanser with betaine and sodium PCA for sensitive-feeling or dehydrated skin.

copy.description: Foam rinses away makeup residue and daily buildup with this cleanser for all skin types. Skin feels clean and comfortable after use.
copy.seoDescription: A foaming cleanser that rinses away makeup residue and daily buildup while leaving skin clean and comfortable.

copy.description: Tired-looking skin, including the under-eye area, gets a lightweight layer of caffeine gel. The texture layers easily and leaves the complexion looking more rested.
copy.seoDescription: A lightweight caffeine gel for tired-looking skin, including the under-eye area, with a gel texture that layers easily.

copy.description: Hyaluronic acid, shea butter, and aloe give this eye cream its moisturizing texture. The formula helps tired-looking skin around the eyes appear smoother.
copy.seoDescription: A soft eye cream with hyaluronic acid, shea butter, and aloe for a moisturized, smoother-looking eye area.
